idea-plugin.name: IDE Database MCP
idea-plugin.description:
IDE Database MCP exposes database connections configured in JetBrains IDEs as a local MCP (Model Context Protocol) service, so AI/MCP clients can discover data sources and execute SQL directly from the IDE context.

Tool list (tools/list)

  • database_list_datasources: discover available IDE-managed data sources with name, url, driverClass and an inferred type.
  • database_list_databases: list databases/catalogs/schemas under one IDE-managed data source.
  • database_execute_sql_query: execute SQL intended for read/query use and return rows.
  • database_execute_sql_dml: execute SQL intended for data modification.
  • database_execute_sql_ddl: execute SQL intended for schema/structure changes.
  • database_execute_nosql_query: execute NoSQL statements intended for read/query usage.
  • database_execute_nosql_write_delete: execute NoSQL statements intended for write/delete usage.
  • database_list_table_schema: get table and column structure (schema) with relevance-ranked smart sampling — supports catalog/schema namespace filtering, keyword scoring, table prefix filter, and optional index info.

Database coverage: database_list_databases works for major SQL engines (MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle, SQL Server, SQLite, CockroachDB, H2) and metadata-aware NoSQL connectors (MongoDB, Apache Cassandra, Redis, etc.).

SQL capability: This plugin supports query, DML, and DDL tools. Actual execution is determined by your database account permissions and data source privileges.

Requirement: The JetBrains Database Tools plugin (com.intellij.database) is required.

Network & Privacy:

  • This plugin starts a local HTTP server bound exclusively to 0.0.0.0 (loopback). It is accessible from remote hosts or other machines on the same network.
  • Database query results, schema metadata, and data source names are made available to local MCP clients through this local service. No data is transmitted to any external server or third-party service by this plugin.
  • This plugin does not collect telemetry, usage statistics, or personal data. No data leaves your machine.
  • Database credentials (passwords) configured in the IDE are not exported or accessible through the MCP API — only connection names, URLs, and driver class information are exposed.

AI Tool Usage: This plugin is designed to work with AI assistants and MCP clients (e.g., Claude, GitHub Copilot, Cursor). When an AI client calls this plugin's tools, the AI receives database schema information and query results from your local IDE data sources. You retain full control over which data sources are exposed via the scope setting (GLOBAL / PROJECT / ALL).

Source code: https://github.com/skrstop/ide-database-mcp

中文说明

IDE Database MCP 将 JetBrains IDE 中已配置的数据库连接暴露为本地 MCP（Model Context Protocol）服务，使 AI/MCP 客户端可以直接基于 IDE 上下文发现数据源并执行 SQL。

工具列表（tools/list）

  • database_list_datasources：发现 IDE 管理的数据源，返回包括名称、地址、驱动类和推断的 type。
  • database_list_databases：列出指定数据源下的数据库、catalog 和 schema。
  • database_execute_sql_query：执行用于读/查询用途的 SQL 并返回行。
  • database_execute_sql_dml：执行用于数据修改的 SQL。
  • database_execute_sql_ddl：执行用于模式/结构更改的 SQL。
  • database_execute_nosql_query：执行用于读/查询用途的 NoSQL 语句。
  • database_execute_nosql_write_delete：执行用于写入/删除用途的 NoSQL 语句。
  • database_list_table_schema：获取数据库表与列结构（Schema），支持命名空间过滤（catalog / schema）、关键词相关性评分采样、表名前缀过滤及可选索引信息返回。

网络与隐私声明：

  • 本插件在本地启动一个 HTTP 服务，仅绑定 0.0.0.0（回环地址），可被局域网内其他机器访问。
  • 数据库查询结果、Schema 元数据、数据源名称等信息会通过该本地服务暴露给本地 MCP 客户端。本插件不向任何外部服务器或第三方服务传输数据。
  • 本插件不收集任何遥测数据、使用统计或个人信息。所有数据均不离开本机。
  • IDE 中配置的数据库密码不会通过 MCP API 暴露，MCP 客户端只能获取连接名称、URL 和驱动类信息。

AI 工具使用说明：本插件专为与 AI 助手和 MCP 客户端（如 Claude、GitHub Copilot、Cursor 等）协同工作而设计。当 AI 客户端调用本插件工具时，AI 会从本地 IDE 数据源中获取数据库 Schema 信息和查询结果。你可以通过 scope 设置（GLOBAL / PROJECT / ALL）控制哪些数据源被暴露。

依赖要求：必须安装并可用 JetBrains Database Tools 插件（com.intellij.database）。

代码地址：https://github.com/skrstop/ide-database-mcp
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.8
  • Multi-project data source support: database_list_datasources now merges data sources across all open projects and returns project and projectPath fields to help AI distinguish same-named data sources from different projects.
  • Custom Tools: Data source selector now displays scope tag (【global】/【project】) and project name in the format 【全局/项目】- name -（project）; both projectHint and projectPath are persisted for precise routing at execution time.
  • Ambiguity detection: operations that require a data source now throw a clear error with candidate project names and paths when the data source name is ambiguous across projects.
  • Ambiguity detection: when the project parameter matches multiple projects by name (same name, different path), the error now lists all matching paths and instructs the caller to use a path instead.
  • 多项目支持：数据源列表合并多项目，每条数据源记录携带项目名与路径信息。
  • 自定义工具数据源选择新增 scope 与项目信息展示，持久化项目名和路径，执行时优先使用路径精准路由。
  • 同名数据源/同名项目场景下主动报错并给出候选列表，引导用户/AI 补充精确的 project 路径参数。
0.1.7
  • Custom Tools: Added Copy / Duplicate button in the toolbar (after the remove button) to create a deep copy of the selected custom tool, with auto-generated unique name.
  • Custom Tools: Preview row count now respects the user-configured Max Rows field (defaults to 100 when unset); preview panel height increased for better readability.
  • Custom Tools: After saving (Apply / OK), the method call statistics table in the tool window now immediately reflects additions, deletions, enables, and disables — removed/disabled tools disappear and newly added/enabled tools appear with a zero-count entry.
  • 自定义工具新增复制按钮，支持一键深拷贝选中工具（含所有参数）并自动生成唯一方法名。
  • 自定义工具测试预览行数改为使用「最大行数」字段配置值；预览面板高度增大。
  • 保存自定义工具配置后，工具窗口方法调用统计表立即同步：已删除/禁用条目移除，已新增/启用条目预置 0 计数。
0.1.6
  • 修复若干已知问题，提升整体稳定性。
  • 全面优化性能，降低 CPU 占用并提升 ToolWindow 响应速度。
0.1.5
  • New tool: database_list_table_schema — smart schema sampling with relevance ranking. Supports catalog/schema namespace filtering, keyword scoring on table/column names and comments, table prefix filter, configurable max-table count (1–200), and optional index info.
  • Privacy: Added explicit network and data handling disclosures in plugin description per Marketplace guidelines.
  • Improved MCP server graceful shutdown handling on IDE exit.
  • Enhanced database_list_datasources: now returns databaseVersion for each data source.
  • Improved data source type inference: IntelliJ Database API is now the highest priority (before JDBC URL / driver class fallback).
  • Added multi-priority database version resolution: Database API → JDBC URL parameter → driver class heuristic.
  • Added log rotation and configurable log settings (max entries, max file size, max rotated files, read buffer size).
  • Added project-level settings scope support (GLOBAL / PROJECT).
  • Added runtime log viewer in the Database MCP tool window.
0.1.4
  • Dual-variant build: modern (IDE 2025.2+, includes MCP Server toolset integration) and legacy (IDE 2022.3–2025.1).
  • Optional mcpToolset extension for com.intellij.mcpServer when available in the IDE.
  • Tool window: Method counter, call statistics (avg/total ms), and log search panel.
  • Multi-window-safe startup using app-level state locking.
0.1.3
  • Added NoSQL tools: database_execute_nosql_query and database_execute_nosql_write_delete.
  • Added database_list_databases tool for catalog/schema enumeration.
  • Added data source type inference from JDBC URL and driver class.
  • Added data source scope control: GLOBAL / PROJECT / ALL.
0.1.2
  • Added Settings UI under Settings | Tools | Database MCP.
  • Added auto-start option for the local MCP service on IDE startup.
  • Added service status display and manual start/stop controls.
0.1.1
  • Split SQL tools into separate database_execute_sql_query, database_execute_sql_dml, and database_execute_sql_ddl tools.
  • Added health endpoint at /health.
0.1.0
  • Initial release: local MCP/JSON-RPC service exposing JetBrains Database data sources.
  • Supported tools: database_list_datasources, database_execute_sql_query.
